next_steps: Perform RPR/VDRL and treponemal-specific antibody test
Obtain skin biopsy of the rash
Order ANA, ANCA, anti-dsDNA, and complement levels (C3, C4)
Perform serum protein electrophoresis and ferritin level
Obtain ophthalmologic consultation to rule out ocular syphilis
Perform lumbar puncture if there is any suspicion of neurologic involvement
Perform nontreponemal (RPR/VDRL) and treponemal-specific antibody tests
Perform skin biopsy of the rash
Order ANA, ANCA, anti-dsDNA, and complement C3/C4 levels
Perform repeat CBC with manual differential and peripheral blood smear
Consider ENT consultation with nasal biopsy if systemic workup is non-diagnostic
